# ActivityVideoStudio

> A macOS app that overlays activity data (.FIT files from GPS smartwatches) onto action-camera video — rendering heart rate, pace, distance, elevation, cadence, and a live GPS map. Free on the Mac App Store.

## What it is
ActivityVideoStudio syncs .FIT activity files with action-camera MP4 footage and burns telemetry overlays into the video. It is a native macOS app built for trail runners, cyclists, and other action-camera users who want data-rich videos of their activities.

## Key facts
- Platform: macOS 14 (Sonoma) or later; Apple Silicon or Intel Mac
- Price: Free
- Privacy: All processing is local on the Mac. No data collection, no server uploads, App Sandbox enabled, no analytics SDKs.
- Inputs: .FIT activity files (recorded by GPS smartwatches); action-camera MP4 video (H.264 / HEVC, up to 4K)
- Outputs: a single MP4 with overlays burned in

## Features
- GPS mini-map with live position (satellite imagery tiles)
- Heart-rate zone colors (reads HR zones from the .FIT file)
- Elevation profile graph with a live progress indicator
- Large-file / 4K support via streaming processing (handles 10 GB+ videos)
- Multi-clip auto-join for action cameras that split footage into numbered MP4s
- Text overlays with fade in/out
- Auto-generated description text for video sharing

## Compatibility note
ActivityVideoStudio is an independent app. It works with the open .FIT and .MP4 file formats and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any hardware maker.

## Links
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/activityvideostudio/id6764239734
- Website: https://activity-video-studio-lp.vercel.app/
- Privacy policy: https://bokuno-studio.github.io/activity-video-studio/privacy.html
- Contact: https://activity-video-studio-lp.vercel.app/#contact
